{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323015653DB8E7DCAEA9D35DABFF5"}"},"total":4770},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7309485767193182976","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好好好，这才是不可名状，那些上来就什么外神变女到我家什么的，就是蹭着克苏鲁流量的爽文罢了，最近看了不少小说，几乎都是跳章节跳页数看的，就只有这本书让我一句一句的读下去，文字恰到好处 ，语句通顺，一些医学科普什么的也很好，其中不少像是自由基我高中生物也学过哈哈哈，剧情也是平滑的向前推进，就是唯一的不足就是太短了，作者加油，一定要耐的住性子，不求快，但求每章都要斟酌打磨一下，稳下心，提前作好大纲，我相信成绩可以比肩斩神，十日终焉，异兽迷城(番茄比较火的)，甚至超越，加油作者!","text_exts":[{"e":37,"s":34,"text":"克苏鲁","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%85%8B%E8%8B%8F%E9%B2%81&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177420221435DABFF5%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227309485767193182976%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227272576979113610298%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%85%8B%E8%8B%8F%E9%B2%81%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":214,"s":210,"text":"十日终焉","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%8D%81%E6%97%A5%E7%BB%88%E7%84%89&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177420221435DABFF5%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227309485767193182976%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227272576979113610298%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8D%81%E6%97%A5%E7%BB%88%E7%84%89%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":219,"s":215,"text":"异兽迷城","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%BC%82%E5%85%BD%E8%BF%B7%E5%9F%8E&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177420221435DABFF5%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227309485767193182976%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227272576979113610298%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%BC%82%E5%85%BD%E8%BF%B7%E5%9F%8E%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1701873896,"group_id":"7272576979113610298","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NybhYV3oHKtiTExKLImiHaG1Fjzvlf2Mf2CpGQvJ/Pq9","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3573872974896904","user_name":"喜欢双清的真阳"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3573872974896904","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7272576979113610298","book_info":{"abstract":"【诡异】【克苏鲁】【末日降临】【重铸文明】【文物】【文化】
许晨觉得这个平行宇宙的历史专业实在是没什么前途，于是一番操作后换了医学专业，没想到算是直接跳了火坑，他将面临的是最直接的恐惧。
某岛国的污水入海，海中不可名状的恐怖随之而来，诡异的症状不断出现，文明之光如同风中摇曳烛火，文明支柱也岌岌可危，这个小家伙又能做些什么？
“假如我们的文明，每一项奇迹都是一张牌，那么文字与语言则是我们最后的底牌，其它的都可以在祂的牌桌上打出去，来算一算吧，我们还有多少能拿出来的砝码？”
“先生，为什么？我们还没到最后的时刻。”
“不，已经到了，我们还有一手的牌，但是对面，远远没有到极限。”

与逆境中的不屈，文明的智慧，个体的渺小，史诗感，同样也有对人性的描写，但有点不足，只从宏观方面描写了
作者也是很用心的查找了各种资料，虽然我看不懂就是了，也无法论证对不对，但让作品的格调上去了
最近的更新速度明显慢下来了，但质量依旧在线，我真的很怕断更，希望作者继续努力，主线推进的很慢，我觉得是正常的，快了反而不好，细细品尝，也希望作者不要急，质量要一直在线，原著的东西慢慢引进，适当在神秘学方面弄点二创
我个人建议是加强群像方面的描写，虽然对学者和战士方面写的让人尊敬，但总归来讲其实是有点单调的，希望可以更加细腻一些，丰富一些，如果这方面有瓶颈，可以先加强主角对主线的推进，加强主角的作用"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723776444,"group_id":"7272576979113610298","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"咸鱼一个，全看心情。。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9Mpq6qjc8ZiwgzWUZ0MPUs=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/834f82f41c5e4794954cbd22b80def8b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787637&x-signature=upH2H2eXs1SH5PxhkySDbkhKwvA%3D","user_id":"56614786940","user_name":"包摸鱼的吴某人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"56614786940","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7272576979113610298","book_info":{"abstract":"【诡异】【克苏鲁】【末日降临】【重铸文明】【文物】【文化】
